docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY TABAK, EDITH AS TO DEFENDANT TABAK, GEORGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-24-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TABAK, GEORGE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-05-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-05-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-05-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-26-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-26-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. THIS IS OFF CALENDAR. DEFENDANT HAS COME IN WITH PROOF THAT HE HAS PAID THE THREE DELINQUENT SPOUSAL SUPPORT PAYMENTS. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ONLY. JUDGE" DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
